MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Continued To Dec-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Juan E. Pearce, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Xu Qin
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Suet Yuk Szeto

After hearing, Defendant Xu Qin's (1) Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is off calendar as moot, responses served by Plaintiff.
(2) Request for evidence sanctions is Denied.
(3) Request for monetary sanctions granted in the sum of $250, to run against Plaintill and Counsel. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Sanctions
